reasoning: This substance is a copper(II) complex with a Schiff base ligand formed from salicylaldehyde and ethylenediamine ([2,2'-ethylenebis(nitrilomethylidene)diphenolato]), where the copper metal is coordinated through nitrogen and oxygen donor atoms of the organic ligand, making it an organotransition metal compound. The ligand contains imine (azomethine) linkages and phenolate groups chelating the transition metal copper.
